desc: Design Drainage System Command: Imports drainage/sanitary systems from a MEPBridge JSON file with Neural Loading visualization.
summary: Design Drainage System Command: Imports drainage/sanitary systems from a MEPBridge JSON file with Neural Loading visualization. User selects TWO inputs: 1. JSON file path 2. Base point for placement. Uses silent Excel auto-mapping for blocks (no manual mapping UI). Creates pipes, fittings (elbows, tees, transitions), and places notes for SVPs and fixtures.
usecase: User wants to design the drainage system from AutoCAD JSON export. User wants to import drainage pipework from coordinated model. User wants automated drainage routing from a coordinated JSON model. User says "design the drainage" or "create drainage system". User says "design sanitary" or "design soil" or "design waste".
notfor: Creating drainage from scratch without JSON input. Manual pipe routing (use standard Revit tools). Editing existing drainage systems.
precondition: Active document must be open. User must have MEPBridge JSON file. At least one level must exist in the model. Appropriate pipe types (Soil, PVC, Cast Iron) must be loaded in the model.
postcondition: MEP elements (pipes), fittings (elbows, tees, transitions), and notes are created. Log file is written next to the JSON file with .drainage.log.txt extension. Neural Loading dialog shows completion summary.
logictree:
check: jsonPath.isValid → proceed
check: basePoint.isSelected → proceed
check: dto.Edges.count > 0 → proceed
resolve: excelMapper.exists → autoMap silently
keywords: can you please design the drainage

selection_inputs.name: BasePoint
selection_inputs.prompt: Pick Revit basepoint (target origin for import)

outputs.name: PipesCreated
outputs.description: Number of MEP pipe segments created

preprompts: Preparing to create your drainage pipework...
successprompts: Drainage system created successfully! {PipesCreated} pipes, {ElbowsPlaced} elbows, {PipeNotesPlaced} notes placed.
Done! Your drainage system is ready with {PipesCreated} pipes.
Drainage design complete! Created {PipesCreated} pipes with {ElbowsPlaced} fittings.
